title: Alter table: add non-null column with default
prompt: Write a migration that adds a `status` column (Ecto.Enum serialized as string) to the existing `users` table. The column must be non-null and default to "active". In Ecto, add with `add :status, :string, null: false, default: "active"`. Write to priv/repo/migrations/20260412300000_add_status_to_users.exs.
tier_rationale: Single alter_table with multiple column options. Medium because the null+default combo is what makes it safe.
